title: anneslia langlassei
intro: Anneslia langlassei, a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, is a type of medicinal plant native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are derived from its bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Anneslia langlassei include treating fever, pain, and inflammation, as well as supporting immune function. The plant is often prepared in herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
